# Threads Analysis API

> API for querying ~52K items (~43K with text) from @maybe_foucault on Threads. Postgres-backed, pgvector embeddings, Tailscale-accessible. Data syncs every 60 minutes.

## Base URL
http://100.71.141.45:4323

## Authentication
None required (local network only via Tailscale)

## Response Format
All endpoints return JSON:
- `posts`: array of post objects (for post-returning endpoints)
- `data`: object or array (for stats/digest/analysis endpoints)
- `count`: number of results
- `query`: what was queried
- `generated_at`: ISO timestamp

## Post Object
- id: string -- Threads media ID
- text: string|null -- post body (null for reposts)
- timestamp: ISO string
- ago: string -- human-readable relative time ("2 hours ago")
- variety: original | reply | quote | repost
- tags: string[] -- topic tags
- primary_tag: string -- main tag
- surprise: float -- information-theoretic unexpectedness (higher = more unusual)
- word_count: int
- permalink: URL to threads.net
- metrics: { views, likes, replies } -- 3 fields, available from April 2024 onward

## Tags (20 categories)
philosophy, tech, personal, reaction, one-liner, question, media, commentary, finance, meta-social, daily-life, work, food, url-share, sex-gender, race, language, political, creative, unclassified

## Endpoints (64 total)

### Time-Based Queries
- GET `/posts/now` -- last 30 minutes
- GET `/posts/hour` -- last hour
- GET `/posts/today` -- today's posts
- GET `/posts/week` -- last 7 days
- GET `/posts/month` -- last 30 days
- GET `/posts/since?minutes=60` -- last N minutes (default 60)
- GET `/posts/between?from=ISO&to=ISO` -- date range (both required)
- GET `/posts/latest?n=10` -- last N posts (default 10)

All time endpoints accept `?limit=500` (max 1000).

### Search & Discovery
- GET `/posts/search?q=term` -- full-text search (limit 50)
- GET `/posts/tag/{tag}` -- posts with tag (limit 100)
- GET `/posts/tag/{tag}/latest?n=5` -- latest N in tag (default 5)
- GET `/posts/random` -- random post (excludes reposts)
- GET `/posts/random/{tag}` -- random post from tag
- GET `/posts/{post_id}` -- single post by ID

### Semantic / Vector Search
- GET `/posts/similar/{post_id}` -- 10 most similar posts by embedding distance
- GET `/posts/semantic-search?q=text` -- search by meaning via Ollama embeddings (limit 20)

### Analytics & Stats
- GET `/stats/overview` -- totals, date range, posts today/week/month
- GET `/stats/streak` -- consecutive posting days
- GET `/stats/top?by=views&n=10` -- top posts by metric (views|likes|replies)
- GET `/stats/top/recent?days=3&by=likes&n=10` -- top posts from last N days by metric
- GET `/stats/top/today` -- most engaged posts today (by views, limit 10)
- GET `/stats/hourly` -- posts per hour today
- GET `/stats/daily` -- posts per day this week
- GET `/stats/tags` -- all tags with counts and percentages
- GET `/stats/velocity` -- posting rate (posts/day) over 7, 30, 90 days

### Social
- GET `/social/mentions` -- top 20 mentioned users (parsed from text)
- GET `/social/interactions` -- top 30 reply partners (from conversations table)
- GET `/social/conversations/{post_id}` -- reply thread for a post

### Knowledge Graph
- GET `/graph/topics` -- tag clusters with connection strengths
- GET `/graph/related/{tag}` -- tags related to a given tag (top 20 by weight)

### Digests
- GET `/digest/today` -- structured today summary (variety breakdown, top tags, top post)
- GET `/digest/week` -- weekly summary (totals, top tags, daily breakdown)
- GET `/digest/brief` -- one natural-language paragraph of last 24h

### Analysis
- GET `/analysis/sentiment?window=week&tag=tech` -- sentiment over time (window: day|week|month, tag optional)
- GET `/analysis/energy?since=ISO` -- energy distribution (low|mid|high), since optional
- GET `/analysis/intent?since=ISO` -- intent distribution, since optional
- GET `/analysis/hours` -- posting pattern by hour of day with avg sentiment
- GET `/analysis/language` -- language distribution across posts

### Genealogy (tech topic tracking)
- GET `/genealogy/topics` -- all tech topics with frequency and date range
- GET `/genealogy/timeline?topic=python` -- monthly tech topic frequencies (topic optional)
- GET `/genealogy/connections?topic=python` -- tech topic co-occurrence graph (topic optional)
- GET `/genealogy/evolution?topic=python` -- chronological posts mentioning a tech topic (required)
- GET `/genealogy/brief` -- natural language summary of tech journey

### Pedagogy (teaching/learning topic tracking)
- GET `/pedagogy/topics` -- all pedagogy topics with frequency and date range
- GET `/pedagogy/timeline?topic=scaffolding` -- monthly pedagogy topic frequencies (topic optional)
- GET `/pedagogy/connections?topic=scaffolding` -- pedagogy topic co-occurrence graph (topic optional)
- GET `/pedagogy/evolution?topic=scaffolding` -- chronological posts on a pedagogy topic (required)
- GET `/pedagogy/brief` -- natural language summary of pedagogical journey
- GET `/pedagogy/vector-search?q=text` -- find pedagogical posts by semantic similarity

### Clusters & Palace
- GET `/clusters?model=all-minilm` -- list all HDBSCAN clusters for a model
- GET `/clusters/summary?model=all-minilm` -- compact top-5 cluster summary
- GET `/palace/navigate?q=text&model=all-minilm` -- semantic search through palace graph (limit default 10, max 50)
- GET `/palace/edges?type=relates_to&limit=30` -- cross-cluster edges by relationship type (limit max 100)

### Haiku
- GET `/haiku/latest` -- latest haiku with source post graph
- GET `/haiku/all` -- all haikus with source counts (limit 50)

### Vibe & Mood
- GET `/vibe/now` -- today's vibe breakdown with percentages
- GET `/mood` -- current mood: sentiment + energy from last 24h
- GET `/drift` -- topic drift: what you're posting more/less about vs last month
- GET `/bridges` -- posts bridging 3+ topic clusters
- GET `/who-am-i` -- personality snapshot: top tags, sentiment, vibes, energy, peak hours, top people

### Meta
- GET `/health` -- health check (DB connectivity)
- GET `/logs` -- recent API access log (in-memory, last 100 requests). `?n=20` for last N, `?path=/posts` to filter by path prefix
- GET `/models` -- available embedding models with cluster stats
- GET `/llms.txt` -- this file (auto-generated from live routes)
- GET `/llms-mini.txt` -- compact version for constrained contexts

## Doc UIs
- /docs/swagger -- Swagger UI (try-it-out)
- /docs/redoc -- ReDoc
- /docs/rapidoc -- RapiDoc
- /docs/scalar -- Scalar
- /docs/elements -- Stoplight Elements
- /docs/rapipdf -- PDF export

## Notes
- Surprise scores: 0-5 = normal, 5-10 = interesting, 10+ = very unusual
- Metrics (views, likes, replies) available from April 2024 onward
- Posts without text (reposts) have text=null
- Embeddings via nomic-embed-text-v2-moe (Ollama)

## Example Queries

"What did I post in the last hour?"
GET /posts/hour

"Show me my philosophy posts from today"
GET /posts/tag/philosophy/latest?n=20

"What's my most liked post?"
GET /stats/top?by=likes&n=1

"What blew up this week?"
GET /stats/top/recent?days=7&by=views&n=5

"Give me a quick summary"
GET /digest/brief

"Search for posts about Foucault"
GET /posts/search?q=foucault

"Find posts similar in meaning to 'surveillance capitalism'"
GET /posts/semantic-search?q=surveillance%20capitalism

"Who do I talk to the most?"
GET /social/mentions

"What's my vibe today?"
GET /vibe/now

"Am I in a good mood?"
GET /mood

"What tech topics am I into lately?"
GET /genealogy/brief

"How has my interest in Python evolved?"
GET /genealogy/evolution?topic=python

"What topics am I drifting toward?"
GET /drift

"Show me a haiku"
GET /haiku/latest

"Who am I on Threads?"
GET /who-am-i
